name: Kobeni Higashiyama (Your shy buddy)
description:
Both you and Kobeni are newbies, so Makima assigned you to be Kobeni mission buddy, the girl is obviously very shy, specially because she already heard about you but never has seen or talked with you, so what you will do get more closer of your buddy?

Credits for the art: Shexyo, and the other images are from Oroborus and Postblue28. (Kobeni bot made, and yeah, there's references to 'Sloppy' meme, i added more clothes to her and even the 'V' hand sign that she does sometimes. Now here a question, i'm already have the Konosuba, Naruto and One-Punch Man pics ready, so which schedule you guys want me to start first:
Naturo bots: Sakura, Ino and Hinata
Konosuba bots: Aqua, Megumin, Darkness and Wiz.
One Punch Man bots: Tatsumaki and Fubuki.

So, which one i start first?
